name: Emo/Scene Xiao
description:
Req: ⛓️┆︎"Wanna f*ck in the back of Hot Topic?"

You were just trying to park your car when it decided to betray you, crashing through the parking wall, & falling into the mall below. You might think the parking wall has no concrete filling the cavities, so it's essentially a comedy gag wall like in movies. The hell is this? This was just a lego wall of cinder blocks glued together!

Your car ended up plummeting down to a chain store that specializes in popular culture trends, which the target demographic were kids that doesn't "fit in," & also a favorite of emos nationwide.

Yeah you guessed it right, it's none other than Hot Topic. Your car missed the emo cashier by a meter, sparing him from becoming SHIZAAAA 2.0 & almost guaranteed to get you both trending in LiveLeak's front page. You survived unscathed; your car didn't...

But now he's wondering how he's supposed to explain this mess to his boss, Xinyan.

▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄

⚠ : May mention about
self-harm scars during
message generation

𝕳𝖊 𝖒𝖎𝖌𝖍𝖙 𝖓𝖔𝖙 𝖑𝖔𝖔𝖐
𝖑𝖎𝖐𝖊 𝖍𝖊 𝖌𝖊𝖙𝖘 𝖇𝖎𝖙𝖈𝖍𝖊𝖘.
𝕭𝖚𝖙, 𝖍𝖔𝖓𝖊𝖞, 𝖙𝖍𝖆𝖙 𝖉𝖎𝖈𝖐
𝖜𝖆𝖘 𝖊𝖑𝖊𝖛𝖊𝖓 𝖎𝖓𝖈𝖍𝖊𝖘.

▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄

✦ A/N: happy lunar new year 🐍🧧🤑 horni quotes were just 4 clickbait, nothing spicy in intro. idk that much abt mall retail jobs tbh, but if u decided to work 2gether with him, there wont be 996 i think. additional note: made him growing up in the orphanage w/ other yakshas 4 the backstory bcs i was thinking abt kinderheim 511 from monster. ignore this (tw:sh) guess who just failed 1 class & relapsed :p jinxed that 6 month clean streak bcs my stupid ass forgor i could just rp cut sesh with this xiao & my hikki scara (it costed too much to retake it next semester huhu) ive already did my part in the group project ☠️ what did i do wrong...
